channel.title: INartsAndEnt
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INartsAndEnt, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why Jenna Ortega Isn't In Scream 7
Both 2026 MCU Movies Lost IMAX Screens For The Same Reason
$169 Million Horror Movie Sequel Is Surging On Streaming Worldwide At The Perfect Time

item.title: 'Grey's Anatomy' Pays Tribute to Eric Dane in Latest Episode

item.title: Rihanna Shares New Video of Her in Studio, Sparks New Music Buzz

item.title: '1000-lb Sisters' Star Amy Undergoes Surgery to Correct Lazy Eye, on Video

item.title: Pink Could Take Over 'Kelly Clarkson Show,' According to New Report
